ab: Niqan kingal ka tnhiyan mu muyas patas, Basaw ka hangan na, ida smhungi madas qyqaya kjiyax.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Basaw，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Basaw, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: Smluhay siida, kmbarux ppatas, ssrus uxay uri o klabuy spatas gnexalan ka hiya.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: Enkingal, endha, entru, srwaun dha kmbarux qyqaya ka hiya.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: Kiya ka kiya ni mluhay kmbarux do ini na bqani ka knbrxan na da.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: Hici do ini nami srwai kmbarux qyqaya da.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: Niqan kingal jiyax, seupu nami musa mkksa nganguc.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: Mkksa ni mkmusa saan psnganguc ka Basaw, ida ini adas klabuy ssrus ka hiya.
ch: 路途中，Basaw想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Basaw wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: Kiya ni kmbarux klabuy ssrus gnexalan ka hiya, ida smiyuk rmngaw hyaan ini ku adas uri msa.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: Basaw o tbiyax mlingis da, msaang rmngaw ni, “Ma namu ini sruwa kmbarux klabuy ssrus knan kana!”
ch: Basaw急的哭了出來。他生氣的說:「為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!」
en: Basaw burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: Rmngaw hyaan ka gnexalan, yasa ini su nanaq adas ni kbrxun su o ini su bqani da!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: Kusun do, mgrbu bi miyah sapah pyasan ka Basaw, bqanan na gnexalan kana ka knbrxan na qyqaya.
ch: 隔天上學，Basaw很早就到學校了，把跟同Basaw學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Basaw arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: Msiqa ni rmngaw gnexalan na ka Basaw, kiya ni rmngaw, “peadas ku nanaq qyqaya babaw da, mhuway namu balay knbarux qyqaya knan.”
ch: Basaw向同學們道歉，並說:「他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。」
en: Basaw aw apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
